---
title: MirrorFull
filters:
  - quarto-svelte
quarto-svelte:
  use:
    - ../components/MirrorFull.svelte
---

This document shows you how to use a basic example Svelte component called `Circles.svelte`.

Create one using an HTML template:

```{ojs}
myMirrorReset = html`<my-mirrorfull></my-mirrorfull>`
```
